title: HTTP Multipart Parser and ONVIF XML Parser Audit

multipart_parser.result: SAFE -- uses snprintf with 256-byte limit, not sprintf
multipart_parser.boundary_validation: 0x4ef818 NULL check triggers 'boundaryBuf is not valid!' error
multipart_parser.verdict: No exploitable overflow. Bounded operations throughout.

onvif_xml_parser.result: SAFE -- All pre-auth ONVIF handlers use C++ std::string and Json::Value exclusively. Zero direct unsafe PLT calls.
onvif_xml_parser.verdict: No exploitable overflow in pre-auth ONVIF handlers.
